############## GDP_120  dataset Description#########################################################
#         GDP_120 is a dataset of 120 Non-redundant PDB chain of GDP interacting protein chains.
#         This dataset is generated by Blastclust (25%) and LPC software.
#         PDB resolution is maximum 3 Angstrom and PDB chain length is minimum 80 amino acid.
#         and interaction distance (distance between GDP - amino acid interaction) is 0-4.0 Angstrom.
#         There are three line in each PDB, First line is PDB ID with chain,
#         Second is  amino acid sequence in single letter code
#         and third line is assignment of GDP at each amino acid residue
#         corresponding to amino acid of respective PDB sequence, where plus (+) sign indicate
#         the corresponding amino acid occur in GDP interacting site  while sign(-) indicates
#         non GDP interacting amino acid residues.
#################### Dataset Description end    ##################################################
>1byuB
AAQGEPQVQFKLVLVGDGGTGKTTFVKRHLTGEFEKKYVPTLGVEVHPLVFHTNRGPIKFNVWDTAGQEKFGGLRDGYYIQAQCAIIMFDVTSRVTYKNVPNWHRDLVRVCENIPIVLCGNKVDIKDRKVKAKSIVFHRKKNLQYYDISAKSNYNFEKPFLWLARKLIGDPNLEFVAMPALAPPEVVMDPALAAQYEHDLEVAQTTALPDEDDDL
